headline: Ranging markets, all HOLD. Three code improvements shipped: catastrophic accuracy floor, drift_regime_gate re-enabled, contract violation noise suppressed.

patient.notes: BTC oversold (RSI 18-28) but 20.4% 3d track record. XAG 82% bullish 3d prob but ranging.

bold.notes: No breakout conditions met. Ranging regime.

weekend_risks: Iran/Hormuz headline risk - only crypto/FX live
BTC weekend moves = MSTR gap risk Tuesday

improvements_shipped.title: drift_regime_gate re-enabled
improvements_shipped.impact: 18th active signal. 66.5% recent accuracy (651 sam). Best regime filter available.

improvements_shipped.title: Catastrophic accuracy floor (35%, 15 sam)
improvements_shipped.impact: Catches signals like Ministral (34.8% recent, 23 sam) that escape the standard 30-sample blend gate. Prevents harmful signals from diluting consensus.

improvements_shipped.title: Contract violation suppression for known failures
improvements_shipped.impact: Reduces critical error noise from incomplete/auth_error invocations (were 19 unresolved). Contract still fires on genuine silent failures.

deferred_improvements.title: mRMR signal redundancy analysis
deferred_improvements.reason: One-time analysis, safe to run anytime

deferred_improvements.title: Structured bull/bear Layer 2 prompt
deferred_improvements.reason: Low risk, can ship next session

accuracy_concerns: Per-ticker consensus barely above 50% for all Tier-1 instruments
Funding rate at 30.8% is actively harmful - should be permanently retired
vwap_zscore_mr at 72.9% (59 sam) is promising but needs more data
next_session_priorities: Run mRMR redundancy analysis on signal_log.db (1-day effort, immediate insight)
Implement bull/bear structured prompt for Layer 2 (1-day, reduces confident-wrong failures)
Evaluate shadow signals with >100 samples for promotion
Monitor drift_regime_gate live accuracy after re-enablement
